summary: Complete testing of Weekly Missions System feature. All backend API tests passed (17/17). Frontend missions page verified: login prompt for unauthenticated users, missions list with progress bars, week number, time remaining, progression summary, and all text in French.

backend_endpoints: GET /api/missions - Returns 200 with week, missions array (5 items), week_end
GET /api/missions - Each mission has: id, key, name, description, target, reward, xp, icon, category, claimed, progress, completed
POST /api/missions/{id}/claim - Returns 400 for uncompleted mission ('Mission non complétée')
Missions are deterministic per user/week combination
frontend_verified: Missions page shows login prompt when not authenticated with French text 'Connectez-vous pour voir vos missions'
Missions page shows weekly missions list when logged in (5 missions)
Missions page shows progress bars for each mission
Missions page shows week number ('Semaine 11') and time remaining ('1j 13h restantes')
Missions page shows progression summary card ('PROGRESSION HEBDOMADAIRE', '0/5 complétées', '0 crédits gagnés')
Missions link appears in the Navbar with Flame icon between 'Échange' and 'Défi'
All text on Missions page is in French (verified 9/9 key French words)
pack_tracking: Pack opening tracks pack_opens in gacha.py Line 76 with: user_id, player_id, rarity, pack_type, opened_at

context_for_next_testing_agent: Weekly Missions System fully tested. GET /api/missions returns 5 deterministic missions per week for each user. POST /api/missions/{id}/claim validates progress before awarding rewards. Pack opens are tracked in pack_opens collection for mission progress. All frontend text is in French. Mission categories: bets, packs, social, trading, daily, credits.
